title: Research Claude CLI with Grok models

log.context: Research Claude CLI with Grok models

Both messages posted successfully to the Discord thread. Here's a summary of the findings:

**Can Claude Code CLI work with Grok models?** Yes, via LiteLLM proxy.

**How it works:** LiteLLM runs as a local proxy server that accepts Anthropic Messages API requests (which Claude Code sends natively) and translates them to xAI's OpenAI-compatible API format. You point Claude Code at the proxy using `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000`, then launch with `claude --model grok-4`.
